serverInfo.name: Cloud Mountain
serverInfo.description: MCP server (planned) for the Cloud Mountain ecotour site. Will expose tour catalogue, itinerary, pricing, and booking resources to AI agents. Server is not yet deployed — this card declares the planned surface area for early agent discovery.

transport.notes: The /mcp endpoint is reserved but not yet serving requests. When deployed it will be hosted on Cloudflare Workers (per the same-origin Workers Route pattern as the contact-form Worker). See https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/modelcontextprotocol/pull/2127 for the Server Card spec this card follows.

tools.name: list_tours
tools.description: List all available ecotours with title, duration, locations, and price range.

tools.name: get_tour
tools.description: Get full details for a specific tour: itinerary, highlights, pricing tiers, included items, FAQ, and booking link.

tour_slug.description: URL slug of the tour, e.g. 'yunnan-four-kingdoms-ecotour'.

tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Get current pricing tiers for a tour (per-person prices by group size, in USD).

resources.name: All tours catalogue
resources.description: Full tour catalogue with titles, durations, locations, and starting prices.

resources.name: Tour detail
resources.description: Per-tour detail (itinerary, highlights, pricing, FAQ, booking link).

resources.name: All blog posts
resources.description: Blog post index with titles, dates, authors, and URLs.

prompts.name: recommend_tour
prompts.description: Given user preferences (duration, interests, group size, dates, budget), recommend the most appropriate Cloud Mountain tour.
